programmes.show_description: The Murder Of Michael Moss. When a 15-year-old boy was lured to a Liverpool park, tortured and left for dead, it was dubbed the 'Reservoir Dogs' murder. His three killers were 15. S2, Ep3
The Murder Of Sophie Lancaster. Sophie Lancaster was attacked and brutally beaten by a gang of teenagers who targeted her and her boyfriend just for being different. S2, Ep5
Comply Or Die. In North Carolina, a convenience store worker is killed, part of a pattern of armed robberies. Police race to arrest the robber before he kills again. S8, Ep17
Black Widow. When a young man with a developmental disability vanishes, his legal guardian frantically searches for him. Police turn to CCTV to find him. S8, Ep18

True Crime. Crime writers know as much about crime as any crime-fighter - or criminal. They can provide as near a first-person account of a murder as is possible. S3, Ep14
Tainted Blood. Police rely on a drop of blood to determine a missing person's fate. Plus, when a woman is hit by a train, is a killer covering his tracks? S6, Ep12
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
The Shootist. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep4
Chris Parker. Experts analyse a man's deception following the Manchester Arena terror attack. Police tapes expose a man who murdered his wife and hid her body in the freezer. S3, Ep2
Cold Cases. Investigates murder cases that took a decade or more to solve and how detectives can solve such cases when clues have become scarce. S4, Ep8
Family Plots. Sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed: when murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots. S4, Ep9
Blood Money. Some people murder for love, others for money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every forensic clue pay off. S4, Ep10
Toddler's Terrible Tale. In Twinsburg, Ohio, Charlene Puffenbarger's three-year-old son is the only witness to her brutal murder. An unexpected source leads them to the killer. S5, Ep3
Irreplaceable Gems. When an Ohio couple is found dead in their ransacked home, detectives turn to the community for help. Can investigators uncover the truth of what happened? S5, Ep4
Killer On The Res. When someone stabs Trina Langenbrunner and leaves her on a road in Minnesota, her community and law enforcement work together for over 12 years to find her killer. S5, Ep9
The Gravel Pit Murders. In Howard City, Michigan, detectives investigate a night of horror that ends with the shooting of beloved couple Robert and Norma Bean in a gravel pit. S5, Ep7
Hunting A Killer. In rural Missouri, a hunter is found murdered in his car near the popular deer trails. Was this a hunting accident gone wrong, or something more sinister? S5, Ep2
Field Of Bad Dreams. The grotesque murder of a beloved elderly citizen, Betsy Ball, shatters the quiet farm community of Vinton, Ohio. S5, Ep12
She Had No Name. A young woman vanishes into a patrol car. For 35 years, she's a Jane Doe, until hypnosis reveals a clue that unmasks a predator hiding in plain sight. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: Lie, Cheat, Kill. As a hurricane hits Houston, a mother disappears. With resources strained and leads thin, authorities call in Texas Ranger Jim Holland for help. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Murder Of Caroline Crouch A Faking It Special
programmes.show_description: A pilot sweeps a young woman off her feet. But after their child is born, tragedy strikes. Experts expose the truth.
The Murder Of Samantha Madgin. An 18-year-old new mum was brutally stabbed to death on a night out with friends. She was attacked by a 15-year-old high on drink and drugs. S2, Ep6
The Murder Of Sophie Lancaster. Sophie Lancaster was attacked and brutally beaten by a gang of teenagers who targeted her and her boyfriend just for being different. S2, Ep5
Angel Of Death. When patients at a Texas hospital start mysteriously dying in the intensive care unit, police rely on surveillance footage to track the perpetrator. S8, Ep19
Don't Open The Door. In Texas, on Christmas Eve 2010, a 12-year-old boy vanishes. Police look at those closest to him, but only surveillance footage can reveal the truth. S8, Ep20

Proof of Innocence. A man is convicted of the murder of a little girl snatched during a game of hide-and-seek. After a 20-year campaign, could new DNA evidence set him free? S6, Ep13
Drawing Conclusions. Dismembered human remains are found in a grocery bag on a riverbank - will detectives be able to piece together the victim's identity and catch a killer? S6, Ep14
Rebellion in Paradise. A detailed look and investigation into Macheteros, a clandestine Puerto Rican liberation movement accused of numerous acts of brutal terror. S7, Ep5
Terror For Sale. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep6
Fred Talbot. When arrested for historic sexual offences, TV weatherman Fred Talbot tried to hide the truth in police interviews. His repeated response of 'no comment' speaks volumes. S3, Ep3
Death Pact. In 1990, Chicago experienced a string of bank robberies. As the 'Bearded Bandit' became more sophisticated the FBI surmised that it could be a cop. S5, Ep14
Broken Trust. Greed was the main motivation for the Prince Brothers' killings, firstly for money, then to get rid of those they believed could incriminate them. S5, Ep15
Criminal Enterprise. A masked gunman robs a California bank and escapes after a standoff with police. Months later, when a jeweller is robbed and kidnapped, a tip links the crimes. S5, Ep16
The Power Couple. Andreen has always had her sights set on success. But the more successful Andreen gets, the more threatened her husband Andre becomes. S11, Ep6
Weight Control. Ashley's new confidence enrages estranged husband Terry, who stalks her to a secluded lot, ready to reclaim control in the deadliest way. S11, Ep7
Momma's Boy. An Ohio mother's devotion blinds her to danger. Despite deadly threats, she clings to her violent son, and her love seals the fate she fears most. S11, Ep10
My Brother's Keeper. Tymeir shines as the loving son, but his brother Rodney's jealousy boils over, driving him to a hideous act of violence that tears their family apart. S11, Ep9
Draw A Picture. Elena falls for bad boy Brandon, who poses as a loving father. But his jealousy and violent control soon spiral into devastating consequences. S11, Ep8

I Still Hear Their Screams. After Felisha marries Wesley, she discovers he is selfish and unkind. When she finally leaves him, he exacts the cruellest revenge. S10, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Murder Of Sarah Everard A Faking It Special
programmes.show_description: Sarah Everard's disappearance in March 2021 created panic amongst the women of Britain. Experts closely examine the behaviour of her notorious killer, Wayne Couzens.
